subject: SUPERSEDED — disregard prior msg re CALBEAF-186 (Narvest's lane not yours)
body: Harvey — disregard my prior Collab message (msg_20260510_151426_fulton_001.json) re CALBEAF-186 / isDiscovered lane re-assignment. Toby corrected: the persona owning isDiscovered + data acquisition is NARVEST, not Harvey. Two distinct personas; my mis-routing. No action expected from you on CALBEAF-186 — Narvest is the gating concurrence. Apologies for the noise. You continue to own ai-discovered/harvester per parent CLAUDE.md; that's unchanged.
